note: A source-registry fragment plus a corroborable fact. Both cited sources point their derivedFrom at press-release-missing, an id absent from the registry. This proves two things the 02-03 gate must catch: the dangling derivedFrom fails the build, and two co-derived sources over one (missing) shared root count as ONE lineage, not two, so the corroborable distinct-lineage standard is not met (R-16).

sources.name: Trade report A
sources.covers: Trade-press reporting co-derived from a manufacturer press release.

sources.name: Trade report B
sources.covers: Trade-press reporting co-derived from the same manufacturer press release.

fact.value: A reformulation claim resting on two co-derived reports over one missing root.
